title: Front Office Manager - McDonald's India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - McDonald's India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
